Localization.Description: A user performed an action with a table or database

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} dropped table "{object.name}" in database "{datafield2}" on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} viewed information about table "{object.value}" in database "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} viewed table "{object.name}" in database "{datafield2}" on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} viewed information about indexes in table "{object.name}" in database "{datafield2}" on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} viewed information about user {object.name} from database "{datafield2}" on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} failed to view information about user {object.name} from database "{datafield2}" on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} failed to view table "{object.name}" in database "{datafield2}" on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} failed to view information about database "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} failed to view information about indexes in table "{object.name}" in database "{datafield2}" on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} failed to view information about table "{object.value}" in database "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} failed to drop table "{object.name}" in database "{datafield2}" on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} viewed information about database "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
